name: Google Cloud Translation API
description:
The Google Cloud Translation API lets websites and programs integrate with
    Google Translate programmatically.

capabilities.name: detections
capabilities.description: Manage detections — detects the language of text within a request, detects the language of text within a request. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: languages
capabilities.description: Manage languages — returns a list of supported languages for translation. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

capabilities.name: translations
capabilities.description: Manage translations — translates input text, returning translated text, translates input text, returning translated text. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
